message:
Fix code review findings in context management

- Avoid holding s.mu during potential Layer 4 LLM calls by using
  copy-modify-write-back pattern in session.go
- Add sort.Strings for deterministic file ordering in checkpoint output
- Reorder functions: Layer 4 (summarizeWithLLM) now follows Layer 3
  (checkpoint) to match logical layer progression

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
